inputs.fcf_source: Pre-revenue; Q1 2026 net loss $188.7M on 629.8M shares ≈ -$0.30/sh; normalized burn excludes one-time debt extinguishment [Assumption]
inputs.normalization_note: No operating revenue. Lawrence consolidated uses cash burn from operations ($7.3M Q1) plus capitalized G&A; not REIT rental path until powered shell delivery.

optionality_gate.notes: Cash + restricted $243M / 637M ≈ $0.38/sh is liquidity not dhando floor; GAAP equity $1.07B ≈ $1.70/sh; PP&E $1.43B is development asset not cash

segments_or_options.label: Project Matador property, plant and equipment (net)
segments_or_options.notes: $1,430.9M PP&E net at 3/31/2026 ÷ 637.6M shares; monetization or tenant-backed financing required to realize

segments_or_options.label: Definitive hyperscaler lease (400+ MW Phase 1)
segments_or_options.notes: Management targets binding tenant within 90 days of May 14 earnings; Beal covenant requires 400 MW lease by anniversary [Assumption on timing]

segments_or_options.label: NRC COL application (4.4 GW nuclear baseload)
segments_or_options.base_terminal_rationale: First new-build COL accepted in 15 years per MD&A; no revenue or fair-value mark; explicit zero in Lawrence base
segments_or_options.notes: 2030s timeline; not consuming capital in base path per 10-Q risk factors

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Binding tenant lease economics (rent per kW, term, capex share)
Yorkville Note draw schedule and dilution
Proxy contest resolution and permanent CEO hire
MPS mobile gen lease commencement July 2027 pick-up dates

bear.notes: Governance overhang, dilution, no tenant; asset write-down or distressed monetization of equipment

base.notes: 35% × $18 tenant re-rate + 65% × $2.24 PP&E floor + cash [Assumption]; first powered shell ops targeted 2027

lines.label: Probability-weighted tenant catalyst (35% × $18)
lines.source: Management commercial urgency; no signed lease as of 3/31/2026 [Assumption]

lines.label: Governance and dilution haircut
lines.source: Tie-out adjustment; proxy contest and going-concern language

bull.notes: Binding tenant + multi-GW gas path; external research note $30+ re-rate on LOI analog [PENDING APPROVAL]

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: PP&E $1.43B reflects procured turbines, substations, site work at cost; no fair-value uplift for permits or tenant option

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / pipeline?
option_scan.evidence: 11 GW permitted campus expandable to 17 GW; TCEQ air permits; no revenue until powered shell delivery (10-Q Note 1)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Q1 G&A $166M incl $134M share-based comp; pre-revenue development company

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: No definitive tenant lease at 3/31/2026; vertical construction awaits lease (10-Q)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Single-segment REIT developer; no look-through stakes

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No distributions; securities class action and Firebird litigation pending

marvin_floor.notes: Pre-revenue burn + bear payoff path; governance and dilution dominate

external.notes: Context only: ~2× book at <$6; $30+ on tenant catalyst; long-term $150 on 6 GW REIT math — not in base IRR

blended_best.weights: 85% Marvin filing floor / 15% external tenant re-rate context (pending approval)
blended_best.notes: External view treated as bull sensitivity only until human promotes source

growth_explanation.mechanism: Pre-revenue until definitive hyperscaler lease and powered shell delivery; rental growth tied to MW leased and escalators in ground leases (TTU 3% annual)
growth_explanation.stress: AI demand efficiency risk; no tenant signed at 3/31/2026

catalyst_paths.impact: 35% × $18 tenant re-rate + 65% × $2.24 PP&E floor + cash [Assumption]; first powered shell ops targeted 2027
Governance overhang, dilution, no tenant; asset write-down or distressed monetization of equipment

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

narrative_hooks: Multiple insiders bought within cluster window

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
